description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Auto Label Issues and PRs that automatically labels issues and pull requests based on keywords in their titles. The workflow should trigger on issue and pull request creation and edits, and allow for manual dispatch. It should use a ubuntu-latest job with write access to issues and pull requests, and read access to repository contents. Use the github-script action to execute a script that determines the type of issue or pull request, checks the title for specific keywords, and adds corresponding labels.
